title: 🎨 Palette: Add consistent ANSI color codes to CLI configuration summary
body:
💡 What: Added consistent ANSI color coding (green/grey) to the deepfake status and alert channels in the CLI configuration summary. 
🎯 Why: The previous output mixed plain text with colored text, causing visual inconsistency. Adding appropriate colors enhances the scannability and aesthetics of the terminal output.
📸 Before/After: Visual changes to CLI output colors.
♿ Accessibility: Improved contrast and visual consistency.
head: jules-15529909890023218113-5ec23d2a
